CONTENT.Club career: Wooh is a youth product of Puiseux Louvres, Chantilly and Nancy. He made his professional debut with Nancy in a 1–0 Coupe de France loss to Sochaux on 20 January 2021.On 1 June 2021, Wooh agreed to a four-year contract with Ligue 1 club Lens, effective from 1 July.On 31 August 2022, Wooh signed to a four-year contract with Rennes.
CONTENT.External links: Christopher Wooh at SoccerwayFFF ProfileCAN 2023 : Wooh, Nkoudou, Ondoa et Gonzalez présélectionnésChristopher Wooh – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Wooh holds French and Cameroonian nationalities. In 2022, he was selected by Rigobert Song to represent the Cameroon national team for the first time in his career, for the upcoming matchups of the Africa Cup 2023. He debuted with them in a 1–0 2023 Africa Cup of Nations qualification win over Burundi on 9 June 2022.

SUMMARY: Christopher Maurice Wooh (born 18 September 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Ligue 1 club Rennes. Born in France, he plays for the Cameroon national team.
